title: WKS Case Hook vocabulary
description: Normative enum vocabulary for case hooks, kept in lockstep with the Java enums. The portal hardcodes these string literals and the backend dispatches them via hand-rolled Gson deserializers (CaseActionDeserializer / ActionHookDeserializer); adding a value on one side without the other breaks silently. This file pins the shared vocabulary. The canonical structural shapes live inline in case-definition.schema.json ($defs.actionHook / $defs.caseAction).
